title: MCExpress Railway Modpack
description: Modpack for the MCExpress Railway Map
body:
This modpack is required to connect to the MCExpress Railway Map server, for both the Build and Guest¹ servers. While you can use it on singleplayer or for your own servers, you must remove all server-specific resource packs.

For more information about MCExpress Railway Map, check out the wiki [here.](https://roftextended.miraheze.org/)

¹Guest server not open yet.
